sentences.arabic: طَلَبَتِ الْأُمُّ مِنَ ابْنَتِهَا أَنْ تَغْسِلَ الْفَوَاكِهَ.
sentences.translation: Majka je zamolila kćerku da opere voće.
sentences.translationEn: The mother asked her daughter to wash the fruit.

sentences.translation: Djevojčica je oprala jabuke, grožđe i banane.
sentences.translationEn: The girl washed the apples, grapes, and bananas.

sentences.arabic: وَضَعَتْهَا فِي طَبَقٍ جَمِيلٍ عَلَى الطَّاوِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stavila ih je u lijepi tanjir na stolu.
sentences.translationEn: She placed them in a beautiful dish on the table.

sentences.arabic: مَدَحَتِ الْأُمُّ ابْنَتَهَا عَلَى عَمَلِهَا الْجَيِّدِ.
sentences.translation: Majka je pohvalila kćerku za njezin dobar rad.
sentences.translationEn: The mother praised her daughter for her good work.
